title: Pseudosempervivum karsianum
taxonomy: Pseudosempervivum karsianum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It is a member of the genus Pseudosempervivum, which is a group of succulents native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is closely related to the species Sempervivum, but it has distinct characteristics that set it apart. Pseudosempervivum karsianum is often classified as a hybrid or a subspecies of Sempervivum, but its exact classification is still a matter of debate among botanists. Further research is needed to clarify its taxonomic status within the Asphodelaceae family.
